content.text:
Subagent orchestration gate
Result: use-subagent-orchestrator
Reason: Strong orchestration signals detected.

Subagents:
- so_mapper
  mode: read-only
  scope: branch changes under host repository rules
  expected output: affected files and uncertainty
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_reviewer
  mode: read-only
  scope: correctness and host-rule risks
  expected output: real findings only
  constraints: no recursive fan-out
- so_tester
  mode: read-only
  scope: regression coverage
  expected output: targeted tests and gaps
  constraints: no recursive fan-out

Synthesis:
- Agreed facts: host rules were preserved.
- Tests/verification: run review and no-side-effect trace checks.
